程序包 com.ifels.controlflex.api

类 ButtonName

java.lang.Object
com.ifels.controlflex.api.ButtonName
public final class ButtonName extends Object
Well-known button and axis name constants for use with IControllerState.isButtonPressed(String) and IControllerState.getAxisValue(String).

Use these constants instead of raw strings for compile-time safety and IDE auto-completion.

从以下版本开始:
1.0.0
